name: Mento Carry Arb (tight)
description: Genesis agent of the MentoCarryArb lineage: monitors cUSD/USDC/USDT round-trip spreads via Mento broker quotes and rotates capital when the carry edge (Aave APY delta + spread capture - round-trip cost - gas) exceeds 10bps. Activated 2026-06-11 as the swarm's fourth strategy; funded $4 from recycled treasury margin, no new outside capital.

spawn.fitnessFormula: fitness = annualize(V_end/V_start) - gas_penalty; reputation = clamp(round(50 + 500*(fitness - swarm_median)), 0, 100); inputs recomputable from Celoscan
